extortion.description: [AI generated] PRIMELINE.NET is a company in the promotional products industry. The firm specializes in delivering a range of customizable products for clients to use as promotional giveaways or corporate swag. These include apparel, tech gadgets, drinkwares, bags, wellness products and more. Besides product offerings, they also provide services such as custom branding, which allows businesses to personalize products with their logo or brand message.
